sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

print("All objects:")
for color in sorted(by_color.keys()):
    print(f"\n{color}:")
    for n in by_color[color]:
        b = n['boundary']
        if b:
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  bounds=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}] pixels={n['pixels']}")
        else:
            print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")

print(f"\nYellow dots: {sum(1 for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)}")
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Press SPACE to activate yellow cross mode
action(['SPACE'])

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

# Find player position
player_pos = None
for n in by_color['W']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        player_pos = (b[0][0], b[0][1])
        print(f"Player at: {player_pos}")

# Check yellow cross state
yellow_arms = [n for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] > 5]
yellow_dots = sum(1 for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)
print(f"Yellow cross arms: {len(yellow_arms)}, dots: {yellow_dots}")

# Move from player_pos to [9,15]
if player_pos:
    pr, pc = player_pos
    tr, tc = 9, 15
    moves = []
    if tr < pr:
        moves += ['UP'] * (pr - tr)
    elif tr > pr:
        moves += ['DOWN'] * (tr - pr)
    if tc < pc:
        moves += ['LEFT'] * (pc - tc)
    elif tc > pc:
        moves += ['RIGHT'] * (tc - pc)
    print(f"Moving from {player_pos} to [9,15]: {len(moves)} moves")
    if moves:
        action(moves)
        
        # Check result
        nodes2 = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        by_color2 = defaultdict(list)
        for n in nodes2:
            by_color2[n['color']].append(n)
        yellow_dots2 = sum(1 for n in by_color2['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)
        print(f"After move, yellow dots: {yellow_dots2}")
        print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Press SPACE to activate yellow cross mode
action(['SPACE'])

nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

# Find player position
player_pos = None
for n in by_color['W']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        player_pos = (b[0][0], b[0][1])
        print(f"Player at: {player_pos}")

# Check yellow cross state
yellow_arms = [n for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] > 5]
yellow_dots = sum(1 for n in by_color['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)
print(f"Yellow cross arms: {len(yellow_arms)}, dots: {yellow_dots}")

# Move from player_pos to [9,15]
if player_pos:
    pr, pc = player_pos
    tr, tc = 9, 15
    moves = []
    if tr < pr:
        moves += ['UP'] * (pr - tr)
    elif tr > pr:
        moves += ['DOWN'] * (tr - pr)
    if tc < pc:
        moves += ['LEFT'] * (pc - tc)
    elif tc > pc:
        moves += ['RIGHT'] * (tc - pc)
    print(f"Moving from {player_pos} to [9,15]: {len(moves)} moves")
    if moves:
        action(moves)
        
        # Check result
        nodes2 = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        by_color2 = defaultdict(list)
        for n in nodes2:
            by_color2[n['color']].append(n)
        yellow_dots2 = sum(1 for n in by_color2['Y'] if n['pixels'] <= 1)
        print(f"After move, yellow dots: {yellow_dots2}")
        print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
